LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SOJURN PROPERTIES, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF JUANITO PATALINGHUG'S ENTIRE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. SOJOURN PROPERTIES FAILED TO PROVIDE AUTHORITY STATING THAT A PLAINTIFF MAY NOT FILE A CIVIL ACTION PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE 3706 PRIOR TO THE ADJUDICATION OF WHETHER THE PLAINTIFF HAS A COMPENSABLE WORKERS' COMPENSATION CLAIM. RATHER, THERE IS AUTHORITY THAT AN EMPLOYEE MAY COMMENCE PARALLEL PROCEEDINGS IN CIVIL COURT AND BEFORE THE WORKERS COMPENSATION APPEALS BOARD. (LE PARC COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION V. WORKERS' COMPENSATION APPEALS BOARD (2003) 110 CAL.APP.4TH 1161, 1173-74; LABOR CODE 3706 AND 3715.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: GORDON F. AIAVAO, CSR # 11216, EMAIL: GAIAVAO@SFTC.ORG.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-17-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Clark W. Patten, Esq. of the Law Offices of Clark W. Patten, Tel. 925.258.9309, for defendant and moving party;
Lael Abaya, Esq. of Lune & Sutherland, Tel. 510.900.5130, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT SOJURN PROPERTIES, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT as follows:
Defendant Sojourn Properties, Inc.'s motion to strike plaintiff Juanito Patalinghug's entire complaint is denied. Sojourn Properties failed to provide authority stating that a plaintiff may not file a civil action pursuant to Labor Code 3706 prior to the adjudication of whether the plaintiff has a compensable workers' compensation claim. Rather, there is authority that an employee may commence parallel proceedings in civil court and before the Workers Compensation Appeals Board. (Le Parc Community Association v. Workers' Compensation Appeals Board (2003) 110 Cal.App.4th 1161, 1173-74; Labor Code 3706 and 3715.) Order signed. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR # 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org.
